race.comment: LIKA REMI (6) was in the money two starts back at Port Macquarie but couldn't back it up last time when ninth over 1262m at Taree. This is a nice drop in grade and expected to go close. BONDI PROPHET (1) saluted at this track two runs ago. Fair effort last time out when second over 1250m at Kempsey, beaten 2.5 lengths. Taking on a better line-up this time but he is good enough to play a major role. WILDERNESS STAR (2) hasn't been able to break through for an extended period, the latest effort when ninth over 1312m at Taree. Ideally placed and is sure to play a major role. RIVOLI STAR (9) missed the placings two runs back then improved last start but found one better when second over 1450m at Kempsey. Best efforts measure up so capable of another big run.
